subcodes.first_line: This is a Book sent down by the All-Merciful for those who desire to drink of the sealed wine, poured forth by the hands of His Lord's tender care, the All-Compelling [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن اراد ان یشرب الرحیق المختوم بایدی عنایه ربه المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @love of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
